name: Modern Health Mental Health Benefits REST API
what_it_does: Modern Health employer mental health benefits REST API for HR and benefits teams to manage employee mental health program enrollment, utilization, provider matching, and reporting — enabling automated benefits integration, eligibility management, utilization tracking, and population health analytics through Modern Health's evidence-based mental health platform. Enables AI agents to manage eligibility management for employee mental health benefit enrollment and verification automation, handle member onboarding for employee program registration and assessment automation, access utilization reporting for mental health session utilization and engagement analytics automation, retrieve provider matching for therapist and coach recommendation and assignment automation, manage program management for care pathway and mental health program configuration automation, handle HR integration for HRIS benefit enrollment and eligibility sync automation, access population analytics for workforce mental health trend and risk analytics automation, retrieve EAP integration for employee assistance program utilization tracking automation, manage care coordination for employee care plan and referral tracking automation, and integrate Modern Health with HR platforms, benefits administration, and EAP systems for employer mental health automation.
use_cases: Syncing employee eligibility from HRIS to mental health benefit program for HR automation agents
Reporting on employee mental health program utilization for benefits analytics automation agents
Integrating Modern Health enrollment with benefits administration platforms for benefits operations agents
Tracking population mental health engagement for workforce wellness automation agents
not_for: Clinical treatment and psychiatric medication management (Modern Health is coaching and therapy benefits, not clinical psychiatric care)
Individual consumer mental health apps without employer benefit (Modern Health is employer-sponsored; BetterHelp and Talkspace serve direct consumers)
Inpatient and crisis mental health services (Modern Health is outpatient coaching/therapy; crisis services require clinical crisis infrastructure)
best_when: An HR or benefits team at a large employer wanting AI agents to automate mental health benefit eligibility management, utilization reporting, and HRIS integration through Modern Health's employer mental health platform.
avoid_when: EMPLOYER CONTRACT IS REQUIRED: Modern Health serves employer clients; automated individual-access assumption creates no_employer_agreement for teams without Modern Health employer agreement; automated must be a Modern Health employer client. HIPAA PHI RESTRICTIONS APPLY: Mental health data is protected health information under HIPAA; automated unrestricted-data assumption creates hipaa_violation for accessing or processing individual employee mental health records outside permitted purposes; automated must implement HIPAA-compliant data handling. ELIGIBILITY SYNC REQUIRES HRIS MAPPING: Employee eligibility requires mapping HRIS fields to Modern Health eligibility criteria; automated instant-sync assumption creates eligibility_mismatch for HRIS integrations without field mapping configuration; automated must configure HRIS field mapping before eligibility sync. UTILIZATION DATA IS AGGREGATED FOR PRIVACY: Modern Health utilization reports are aggregated to protect employee privacy; automated individual-level assumption creates data_not_available for individual employee mental health session queries; automated must use aggregated reporting endpoints.

auth.notes: Modern Health uses OAuth2 for Benefits REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2017 by Alyssa Petersel and Erica Johnson. Raised $170M+. Valuation: $1.17B (unicorn, 2021). Products: Modern Health Platform (employer mental health benefits), coaching, therapy, digital programs. 500+ enterprise employers. 4,000+ therapists and coaches. Industries: tech, finance, healthcare, retail. Competes with Lyra Health, Spring Health, and ComPsych for employer mental health benefits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; employer contract required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee-per-month (PEPM) pricing; contract based on employee population and services
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. $170M raised. $1.17B valuation. PEPM employer pricing. 500+ enterprise employers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; API throttled per employer agreement

known_agent_gotchas: UTILIZATION DATA IS MINIMUM-N AGGREGATED: Modern Health aggregates utilization data at minimum group sizes to protect employee privacy (typically minimum 5-10 employees); automated granular-reporting assumption creates data_suppressed for small team utilization queries below minimum threshold; automated must design analytics for aggregated reporting

ELIGIBILITY FILE FORMATS ARE SPECIFIED: Employee eligibility upload uses defined file format (SFTP or API); automated freeform-eligibility assumption creates eligibility_rejected for eligibility files not matching Modern Health's required format; automated must use Modern Health's eligibility file specification

HRIS INTEGRATION REQUIRES EMPLOYER SSO: Many Modern Health HRIS integrations require employer SSO configuration; automated API-only assumption creates authentication_gap for integrations requiring SSO-based identity federation; automated must configure SSO as part of HRIS integration

BENEFIT SESSIONS HAVE ANNUAL LIMITS: Employee benefit sessions may be capped per contract; automated unlimited-sessions assumption creates session_limit_reached for employees who have exhausted annual session allowance; automated must track and communicate session limits

PROVIDER AVAILABILITY VARIES BY GEOGRAPHY: Therapist and coach availability varies by employee location; automated universal-provider assumption creates no_provider_available for employees in underserved geographic areas; automated must handle provider matching failures gracefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mental health benefits. HIPAA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Employee mental health and PHI data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mental health benefits. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Employee behavioral health and PHI.
